description: Directed service dependency graph. An edge {from: A, to: B} means service A calls/depends-on B. Observed from trace spans + olapdb topology over the last 24h. olapdb-tso is the Timestamp Oracle: every olapdb write transaction must obtain a commit timestamp from it.

edges.note: Flink job consumes the olapdb ingestion write path
acquires commit timestamps + CnchLocks for every write txn

note: Request/dependency flow points A->B (A depends on B). Causally, when the callee olapdb-tso stalls, the failure propagates back UP the chain to the ingestor, then the Flink job, then platform-api.
